case_title: HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME VS PENA, RICO S. et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, HAZEL D

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENA, RICO S. ROMERO, HAZEL D $1,494.46 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,494.46, DEF WAIVES DEFECT IN SERVICE. DEF TO PAY PLAINTIFF $200.00 8/13/93. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $200.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, RICO S.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, RICO S. ROMERO, HAZEL D
